subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, render thanks unto God that thou hast been confirmed with the light of guidance and art drawn to the fragrances of the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شکر کن خدا را که موید بنور هدی گشتی و منجذب بنفحات ملکوت ابهی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
